commits.summary: Slice B4 RED — obs_v2 physical-bounds antibody

bounds_chosen.rationale: Lower covers Vostok 1983 record (-89.2°C) with 0.8° margin; upper covers Death Valley extreme (54.4°C verified, 56.7°C disputed) with 3.3° margin. Catches Warsaw 88°C class of poison-data failure (workbook N1.8). Inclusive (BETWEEN semantic in CHECK matches >= / <= in writer).
bounds_chosen.expansion_policy: Operator escalation required via packet — do not silently widen if a sensor genuinely reports beyond range. The point is to make poison-data UNCONSTRUCTABLE.

schema_check_scope: NEW DBs only — SQLite ALTER cannot retroactively add CHECK constraints (db.py:330-333 same limitation). Writer-level _validate is the load-bearing antibody for all DBs (legacy + new).

production_path_integration_test.name: test_insert_rows_integration_path_rejects_out_of_bounds
production_path_integration_test.exercises: Build ObsV2Row with temp_current=88.0 + call insert_rows() on :memory: DB. Constructor's __post_init__ validates first; insert_rows never sees a bad row. Pins that validation sits BEFORE the SQL boundary, not inside it.
production_path_integration_test.applies_con_nyx_pattern_lesson: G6 MAJOR #1 — string-grep + literal-arg tests are insufficient; must exercise production composition path.

followups_owed.summary: Per-city source-binding test (the OTHER half of workbook B4): verify each settlement row's settlement_source matches the (city, target_date) → source mapping in docs/operations/current_source_validity.md.
followups_owed.gating: current_source_validity.md format must stabilize first (currently a prose surface; would need a structured section to parse)

lore_extraction_recommendation: If a future Zeus market expands beyond Earth-surface temperature (e.g., upper-atmosphere balloon data), bounds will need re-thinking. Until then, bounds are stable; lore card not needed.
